title: convolvulus fulcratus var. deltoideus
intro: Convolvulus fulcratus var. deltoideus, also known as the 'Deltoideus Convolvulus', is a variant of the Convolvulus fulcratus plant species. It is an herbaceous perennial plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, attributed to the presence of flavonoids, glycosides, and other bioactive compounds. Convolvulus fulcratus var. deltoideus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to support various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating digestive issues.
